commands.repair_reason: - [P2] The patch is already the repair; automation has no narrow defect to fix, and the remaining blocker is maintainer acceptance of the disabled ws retained-part limits.; Needs attention: No supply-chain files changed, but the patch intentionally disables a dependency security hardening limit on Discord gateway sockets and needs maintainer acceptance of that scoped availability tradeoff. commands.review_summary:
The PR passes maxBufferedChunks: 0 and maxFragments: 0 to both Discord gateway WebSocket constructors and updates the related constructor-option tests.

PR surface: Source +10, Tests +68. Total +78 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. I did not rerun the live session, but current source and ws 8.21.0 source show the failing limit path, and the PR body supplies a deterministic over-fragmentation before/after repro plus redacted live Discord READY/heartbeat output.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The patch is already the repair; automation has no narrow defect to fix, and the remaining blocker is maintainer acceptance of the disabled ws retained-part limits.
